notes: Each frontline doctrine button now displays an immediate forecast for casualty risk, ammo burn, and breakthrough risk.
Each doctrine button also displays a short Japanese reason tied to pressure level, lead threat, ammo state, morale state, or damaged facilities.
The assessment is a player-facing command aid; the runtime battle behavior remains driven by StandingOrder updates.
